title: Spicy Papelon Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry made with papelon, Korean chili flakes, and a blend of herbs.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the papelon and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until it starts to soften.
Add the dense, Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and rice vinegar. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds.
Adjust the heat level to your liking by adding more or less Korean chili flakes.
